description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit constructed primarily from metal with a diamond plate texture on all visible surfaces. The structure consists of four evenly spaced horizontal shelves supported by a rectangular frame, providing ample open storage space. The shelves are flat and wide, suitable for holding heavy or bulky items, making it ideal for use in garages, workshops, or urban utility spaces. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, with no doors or enclosed compartments. The metallic finish gives it a utilitarian appearance, and the overall build suggests durability and strength. The unit stands freely on four short legs, elevating it slightly off the ground.
description: A heavy-duty, open metal shelving unit with four spacious shelves and a diamond plate texture, ideal for industrial or urban utility use. Its open-frame design allows easy access and high load capacity.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four shelves and the open, rectangular frame structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow depth and the thickness of the shelves.
description_view_2: Another front view, identical to view 0, displaying the full shelving face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the shelf depth and frame profile.
